name: Revithia Soupa (Chick Pea Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the dried chick peas overnight in cold water to cover. The next day, rinse and drain.
2. In a 4-quart saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil and add the soaked chick peas. Remove any froth that forms.
3. Add the thinly sliced onions and olive oil. Simmer until the chick peas are tender, about one to two hours.
4. Adjust salt at the end, adding hot water (not cold) if needed to make more stock.
5. Serve hot with lemon juice or vinegar.
Makes six servings.
